workflow_gaps: validator previously focused on role/control/tool parity but did not verify skill_stack-to-SKILL.md coverage
naming_or_policy_issues: agent yaml filenames use snake_case while canonical ids use kebab-case (supported but easy to mis-audit manually)
cap fields needed explicit guard checks against startup_tools/allowed_controls lengths

alternatives.summary: Keep validator as-is and rely on manual review for skill and version drift
risks: higher chance of latent agent/skill drift
version mismatches can survive green checks

alternatives.summary: Strengthen validator checks and align governance versions across stores
benefits: keeps registry/workflow/access policy metadata in lockstep
risks: adds stricter checks that can fail legacy drift immediately

alternatives.summary: Generate all agent/skill governance files from a single source schema

recommended.reason: Best quality-to-risk ratio for immediate maintain hardening while preserving current workflow structure.

required_edits.intent: add skill_stack parity checks, skill existence verification, and cap sanity validation
